title: capsicum annuum var. angulosum
intro: Capsicum annuum var. angulosum, also known as the Japanese or Korean hot pepper, is a variety of the Capsicum annuum plant, a species of hot pepper native to the Americas but widely cultivated in East Asia. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Capsicum annuum var. angulosum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving circulation, and boosting the immune system, as well as providing antioxidant properties that protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Capsicum annuum var. angulosum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being added to traditional dishes in Korean and Japanese cuisine.
